a:r.a:t: Frontline roles are aligned with market, falling at or above the market median, with
In-House Sales Executives exceeding the 75th percentile.
Training roles are aligned with or above market, indicating strong incentive packages to offset below market base pay.
Leadership roles are below market median for TCC.
. Talent Acquisition feedback suggests base salary is a key driver of attrition, indicating an opportunity to rebalance pay mix.

For Training roles, market data indicates these positions are not treated as true sellers in the market. HGV may want to reassess whether the current incentive-heavy structure is driving the intended behaviors for these roles.
, falling at or above the market median.
Leadership roles show the largest gap
, with VP and Director base materially below the market median.
A 10% premium has been applied to the survey Sales Training Manager and Sales & Marketing Director roles to reflect a blend of Manager/Senior Manager and Director/Senior Director levels
A 20% discount has been added to the VP of Sales and Marketing and Sales and Marketing Director survey position to reflect responsibilities for only Sales at HGV.
Vice President of Sales and Marketing
